policy: Production Convex .collect() calls are not allowed. Use bounded .take(...), cursor pagination, targeted .first()/.unique(), or aggregate tables instead. If a future exception is unavoidable, add it here with owner, risk, and next action, then justify it in review docs.

files.risk: Medium: supersedeForRun collects all artifacts for a run before patching status. Run-scoped and not a hot project boot path, but can patch many rows after artifact-heavy runs.
files.nextAction: Replace with bounded pagination or status-indexed batches when workflow artifact cleanup is revisited.
